</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">v3.3 (2026-04-09) — PaperOrchestra-Inspired Enhancements</h3><a id="user-content-v33-2026-04-09--paperorchestra-inspired-enhancements" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: v3.3 (2026-04-09) — PaperOrchestra-Inspired Enhancements" href="#v33-2026-04-09--paperorchestra-inspired-enhancements"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Integrates techniques from <a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05018" rel="nofollow">PaperOrchestra</a> (Song, Song, Pfister & Yoon, 2026, Google).</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Semantic Scholar API Verification</strong> — Tier 0 programmatic reference existence check via S2 API. Levenshtein >= 0.70 title matching, DOI mismatch detection, bibliography deduplication via S2 IDs. Graceful degradation if API unavailable.</li>
<li><strong>Anti-Leakage Protocol</strong> — Knowledge Isolation Directive prioritizes session materials over LLM parametric memory. Flags <code>[MATERIAL GAP]</code> for missing content instead of filling from memory. Reduces Mode 5/6 failure risk.</li>
<li><strong>VLM Figure Verification</strong> (optional) — Closed-loop verification of rendered figures using vision-capable LLM. 10-point checklist, max 2 refinement iterations.</li>
<li><strong>Score Trajectory Protocol</strong> — Per-dimension rubric score delta tracking across revision rounds (7 dimensions). Detects regressions (delta < -3) and triggers mandatory checkpoint.</li>
<li><strong>Stage 2 Parallelization</strong> — Visualization and argument building can run in parallel after outline completion.</li>
<li>New versions: deep-research v2.8, academic-paper v3.0, academic-pipeline v3.2</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">v3.2 (2026-04-09) — Lu 2026 Nature Integration</h3><a id="user-content-v32-2026-04-09--lu-2026-nature-integration" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: v3.2 (2026-04-09) — Lu 2026 Nature Integration" href="#v32-2026-04-09--lu-2026-nature-integration"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Integrates insights from Lu et al. (2026, <em>Nature</em> 651:914-919) — the first end-to-end autonomous AI research system to pass blind peer review.</p>
<ul dir="auto">

<li><strong>Reviewer Calibration Mode</strong> (academic-paper-reviewer v1.8) — opt-in FNR/FPR/balanced-accuracy measurement against user-supplied gold set. 5× ensembling, cross-model default-on, session-scoped confidence disclosure.</li>
<li><strong>Disclosure Mode</strong> (academic-paper v2.9) — venue-specific AI-usage statement generator. v1 covers ICLR, NeurIPS, Nature, Science, ACL, EMNLP.</li>
<li><strong>Early-Stopping Criterion</strong> (academic-pipeline v3.1) — convergence check + budget transparency at pipeline start.</li>
<li><strong>Fidelity-Originality Mode Spectrum</strong> — classifies all modes across 3 skills per Lu 2026 Fig 1c.</li>
<li>New versions: academic-paper v2.9, academic-paper-reviewer v1.8, academic-pipeline v3.1</li>
</ul>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">v3.1 (2026-04-06) — Anti-Context-Rot + Cognitive Frameworks + Lean Size</h3><a id="user-content-v31-2026-04-06--anti-context-rot--cognitive-frameworks--lean-size" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: v3.1 (2026-04-06) — Anti-Context-Rot + Cognitive Frameworks + Lean Size" href="#v31-2026-04-06--anti-context-rot--cognitive-frameworks--lean-size"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Inspired by patterns from <a href="https://github.com/aspi6246/Claude-Code-Skills-for-Academics">aspi6246/Claude-Code-Skills-for-Academics</a>.</p>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Wave 1: Anti-Context-Rot Anchors</strong></p>
<ul dir="auto">

<li>22 IRON RULE markers on critical rules that must not be violated even in long conversations</li>
<li>Read-only constraint on academic-paper-reviewer (reviewers cannot modify the manuscript)</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Wave 2: Traceability + Cognitive Frameworks + Reinforcement</strong></p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>R&R Traceability Matrix (Schema 11): adds "Author's Claim" and "Verified?" columns to re-review output, enabling independent verification of revision claims</li>
<li>3 cognitive framework reference files teaching agents "how to think" not just "what to do":
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>argumentation_reasoning_framework.md</code> — Toulmin model, Bradford Hill causal reasoning, inference to best explanation, epistemic status classification</li>
<li><code>review_quality_thinking.md</code> — three lenses (internal validity, external validity, contribution), common reviewer traps, calibration questions</li>
<li><code>writing_judgment_framework.md</code> — clarity test, reader's journey, discipline-specific voice, revision decision matrix</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Mid-conversation reinforcement protocol: stage-specific IRON RULE + Anti-Pattern reminders at every pipeline transition</li>
<li>Self-check questions at every FULL checkpoint (citation integrity, sycophantic concession, quality trajectory, scope discipline, completeness)</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Wave 3: Lean Skill Size</strong></p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>SKILL.md total size reduced from 142KB to 85KB (−40%) by extracting detailed protocols to <code>references/</code> files</li>
<li>~15 new reference files created (re-review protocol, guided mode, systematic review, process summary, external review, etc.)</li>
<li>All IRON RULE markers preserved in SKILL.md; detailed content loaded on demand</li>
<li>New versions: deep-research v2.7, academic-paper v2.8, academic-paper-reviewer v1.7, academic-pipeline v3.0</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">v3.0 (2026-04-03) — Anti-Sycophancy + Intent Detection + Dialogue Health</h3><a id="user-content-v30-2026-04-03--anti-sycophancy--intent-detection--dialogue-health" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: v3.0 (2026-04-03) — Anti-Sycophancy + Intent Detection + Dialogue Health" href="#v30-2026-04-03--anti-sycophancy--intent-detection--dialogue-health"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Devil's Advocate Concession Threshold</strong> (deep-research + academic-paper-reviewer): DA must score rebuttals 1-5 before responding. Concession only at ≥4. No consecutive concessions. Concession rate tracking. Frame-lock detection after each checkpoint.</li>
<li><strong>Attack Intensity Preservation</strong> (academic-paper-reviewer): DA does not soften under pushback. Rebuttal assessment protocol with explicit deflection detection. Anti-sycophancy rules prevent persistent pushback from being treated as valid evidence.</li>
<li><strong>Intent Detection Layer</strong> (deep-research socratic): Classifies user intent as exploratory vs. goal-oriented. Exploratory mode disables auto-convergence, raises max rounds, prohibits premature closure. Re-assesses every 3 turns.</li>
<li><strong>Dialogue Health Indicator</strong> (deep-research socratic): Silent self-check every 5 turns for persistent agreement, conflict avoidance, premature convergence. Auto-injects challenges when agreement pattern detected.</li>
<li><strong>Cross-Model Verification Protocol</strong> (shared, optional): Use GPT-5.4 Pro or Gemini 3.1 Pro for integrity verification sample cross-checks and independent DA critique. Sixth-reviewer peer review remains planned, not yet implemented. Activated by setting <code>ARS_CROSS_MODEL</code> env var — without it, everything works as before. See <code>shared/cross_model_verification.md</code> for full setup guide, API patterns, and cost estimates.</li>
<li><strong>AI Self-Reflection Report</strong> (academic-pipeline Stage 6): Post-pipeline self-assessment of AI behavioral patterns — DA concession rate, checkpoint skip rate, health alerts, sycophancy risk rating (LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH), frame-lock incidents, convergence pattern analysis. Includes irony caveat: "this self-reflection is itself produced by the same AI that may have been sycophantic."</li>
<li>Origin: Discovered through a 4-round dialectic experiment where the DA conceded too quickly, the Socratic Mentor tried to converge prematurely, and the entire debate stayed locked in a frame the human set.</li>
<li>Versions: deep-research v2.5, academic-paper-reviewer v1.5, academic-pipeline v2.8</li>
</ul>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">v2.9 (2026-03-27) — Style Calibration + Writing Quality Check</h3><a id="user-content-v29-2026-03-27--style-calibration--writing-quality-check" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: v2.9 (2026-03-27) — Style Calibration + Writing Quality Check" href="#v29-2026-03-27--style-calibration--writing-quality-check"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Style Calibration</strong> (academic-paper intake Step 10, optional): Provide 3+ past papers and the pipeline learns your writing voice — sentence rhythm, vocabulary preferences, citation integration style. Applied as a soft guide during drafting; discipline conventions always take priority. Priority system: discipline norms (hard) > journal conventions (strong) > personal style (soft). See <code>shared/style_calibration_protocol.md</code></li>
<li><strong>Writing Quality Check</strong> (<code>academic-paper/references/writing_quality_check.md</code>): Writing quality checklist applied during draft self-review. 5 categories: AI high-frequency term warnings (25 terms), punctuation pattern control (em dash ≤3), throat-clearing opener detection, structural pattern warnings (Rule of Three, uniform paragraphs, synonym cycling), and burstiness checks (sentence length variation). These are good writing rules — not detection evasion</li>
<li><strong>Style Profile</strong> carried through academic-pipeline Material Passport (Schema 10 in <code>shared/handoff_schemas.md</code>)</li>
<li><strong>deep-research</strong> report compiler also consumes both features optionally</li>
<li>Versions: academic-paper v2.5, deep-research v2.4, academic-pipeline v2.7</li>
</ul>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">v2.7 (2026-03-09) — Integrity Verification v2.0: Anti-Hallucination Overhaul</h3><a id="user-content-v27-2026-03-09--integrity-verification-v20-anti-hallucination-overhaul" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: v2.7 (2026-03-09) — Integrity Verification v2.0: Anti-Hallucination Overhaul" href="#v27-2026-03-09--integrity-verification-v20-anti-hallucination-overhaul"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>integrity_verification_agent v2.0</strong>: Anti-Hallucination Mandate (no AI memory verification), eliminated gray-zone classifications (VERIFIED/NOT_FOUND/MISMATCH only), mandatory WebSearch audit trail for every reference, Stage 4.5 fresh independent verification, Gray-Zone Prevention Rule</li>
<li><strong>Known Hallucination Patterns</strong>: 5-type taxonomy (TF/PAC/IH/PH/SH) from GPTZero × NeurIPS 2025 study, 5 compound deception patterns, real-world case study, literature statistics</li>
<li><strong>Post-publication audit</strong>: Full WebSearch verification of all 68 references found 21 issues (31% error rate) that passed 3 rounds of integrity checks — proving the necessity of external verification</li>
<li><strong>Paper corrections</strong>: Removed 4 fabricated references, fixed 6 author errors, corrected 7 metadata errors, fixed 2 format issues</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">v2.6.2 (2026-03-09) — Intent-Based Mode Activation</h3><a id="user-content-v262-2026-03-09--intent-based-mode-activation" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: v2.6.2 (2026-03-09) — Intent-Based Mode Activation" href="#v262-2026-03-09--intent-based-mode-activation"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>deep-research</strong>: Socratic mode now uses <strong>intent-based activation</strong> instead of keyword matching. Works in any language — detects meaning (e.g., "user wants guided thinking") rather than matching specific strings.</li>
<li><strong>academic-paper</strong>: Plan mode now uses <strong>intent-based activation</strong>. Detects intent signals like "user is uncertain how to start" or "user wants step-by-step guidance" in any language.</li>
<li>Both modes now have a <strong>default rule</strong>: when intent is ambiguous, prefer <code>socratic</code>/<code>plan</code> over <code>full</code> — safer to guide first.</li>
<li>Two-layer architecture: Layer 1 (skill activation) uses bilingual keywords for matching confidence; Layer 2 (mode routing) uses language-agnostic intent signals.</li>
</ul>
